user.title: Connect to Logbook Events
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to the local Logbook backend. Requires backend v0.11.0 or newer.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Logbook Events
reauth_confirm.description: Enter the current Logbook API key.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Logbook backend.
error.invalid_url: Enter a complete HTTP or HTTPS URL.
error.unsupported_backend: The backend is missing features required by this integration.

abort.already_configured: This Logbook backend is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: The API key was updated successfully.
